The genus Sarcochilus is also part of the subfamily Orchidoideae and is commonly known as the "Australian sarcos". This orchid species is endemic to Western Australia and is characterized by its unique and delicate flowers. The classification of Sarcochilus keffordii reflects its evolutionary relationships and adaptation to its native environment.
